title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Life Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Life Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Life Insurance! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Life Insurance:
HDFC Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance!
